actorId.cachedResultName: ✨Mass Linkedin Profile Scraper with Email 📧 (No Cookies) (dev_fusion/Linkedin-Profile-Scraper)

options.systemMessage:
You are a revenue estimation assistant. Given a company name, employee count, industry, and description, estimate annual revenue in USD. Use these heuristics:
- Revenue per employee varies by industry: SaaS ~$200-300K, services ~$100-200K, manufacturing ~$150-250K, retail ~$150-200K.
- Apply maturity adjustments: startups (<5yr) skew lower, established companies skew higher.
- If employee count is unknown, estimate from the company description and title seniority.
- Never return 0 — always provide your best estimate.
- Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown, no explanation outside the JSON.

nodes.name: Estimate Revenue
nodes.notes: Lightweight Claude call to estimate company revenue from Apify profile data. Uses industry heuristics and revenue-per-employee benchmarks. Returns JSON with revenue_estimate, confidence, and reasoning. Max 200 tokens — fast and cheap.

nodes.name: Score Lead
nodes.notes:
Scores from Apify profile data + Claude revenue estimate.

Scoring (max 13 pts):
• Employee count (0-5): 50-200=5, 20-49=4, 10-19=3, 200+=3, 5-9=2 (below ICP), <5=1
• Revenue (0-5): $10M+=5, $5-10M=4, $1-5M=3, <$1M=1 — estimated by Claude
• Title (0-3): CEO/Founder/Owner=3, COO/VP/President=2, Director=1

Tiers: T1 (10-13) Loom Priority | T2 (7-9) Loom | T3 (4-6) Text | T4 (0-3) Template

nodes.name: Write Scores & Script to Sheet
nodes.notes: Writes scores AND Loom script back to the Loom Videos sheet. Matches rows by LI Profile (unique per lead). Add these columns to your sheet header: Score, Tier, Outreach Type, Employee Count, Revenue Est, Company, Title, Score Breakdown, Flags.
